title: Taming the West
writer: Raymond L. Schrock, Bertha Muzzy Sinclair
actors: Hoot Gibson, Marceline Day, Morgan Brown
plot: John Carleton, a wild eastern youth, is sent west by his father in an effort to make a man of him. The cowhands at first mock John because of his foppish golf suit, but when he rides a mean bucking bronco he wins their friendship ...
